CREATE SOLANA TOKEN 0.1.0

Now create and launch Solana Token without code.

Launch you Solana Token, All in one solana
token development and deployment, over 117 steps
including liquidity pool, revokes and burn facility. One click launch!

Create

Any questions

We help thinkers and artists launch their memecoins by making the it a 1-click process
to ensure the most succesful launch with zero-coding.

Tokens are minted and automatically sent to the creator's wallet. The creator's wallet will receive the minted tokens, and the creator can then send the tokens to other wallets. However, in order to launch your meme coin or token you need to add liquidity into pools like Raydium which we do automatically. We put a certain predetermined amount into the pool and send 5% to creator (you) and we keep 1% as fee.

Have you launched your memecoin yet ? .

Yes, you should check Raydium to confirm.

Have you launched your memecoin yet ? .

Liquidity is already floated when you create the token/memecoin. We revoke mint authority as a standard practice so you cannot add more than the initial mint. Minting more after initial creation is considered a potential rugpull.

Have you launched your memecoin yet ? .
